value.found_quote: The browser uses a two-layer security system to control which URLs can be accessed: **Denylist** - Deny dangerous/malicious URLs; **Allowlist** - Explicitly allow trusted URLs ... The denylist is maintained and enforced using the Google Superroots's BadUrlsChecker service ... The allowlist is a local text file that you can edit to explicitly trust specific URLs.
value.name: Allowlist / Denylist
